case_title: SITESCOPE INC. VS. TELECHECK MERCHANT SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SITESCOPE INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,390.71 FILED BY SITESCOPE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT TELECHECK MERCHANT SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-14-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-22-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $65.00) SERVED APR-04-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TELECHECK MERCHANT SERVICES, INC.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
